# Prime Period Theory (PPT)

Prime Period Theory is a descriptive music theory framework grounded in prime-generated periodic relationships.

## AI Agent Instructions

The authoritative specification for this framework is formatted as an OKF (Open Knowledge Format) Knowledge Bundle.

The complete bundle is available as a single unified text file at `/okf-bundle.txt`. This is the recommended entry point for AI agents to ingest the entire theory at once.

- **Unified Spec**: [/okf-bundle.txt](/okf-bundle.txt)
- **Raw Directory**: You can also browse the individual markdown files starting at [/okf/index.md](/okf/index.md)
